description: Few-shot examples for Meridian resume normalizer. Each example has raw parser sections (input) and canonical structured output (output). Add more examples here to improve mapping of non-standard headers.

examples.name: Deng (Relevant Experience, Leadership, Skills and Certifications)
examples.input:
Section: _top
Deng Aguer Bul
deng.bul@spartans.ut.edu
+1 (813) 810-9237
Tampa, Florida

Section: education
The University of Tampa Tampa, Florida
Bachelor of Science in Data Science, Minor: Finance. Expected: May 2029
Honors: Presidential Scholar/Scholarship

Section: relevant experience
Founder | Initiative for Peace – South Sudan: Jul 2024 – Present
• Founded a scholarship and leadership program uniting South Sudanese youth from 64 tribes.

Section: leadership experience
Lead Creator & Choreographer | UWCSEA 2024 CultuRama Singapore
• Directed and choreographed a cross-cultural dance performance. Apr – Oct 2024

Section: skills and certifications
Data & Financial Analysis: Python, Excel. Certifications: Safe TALK, First Aid.

examples.name: Yumna Sweid (Community Service, Servant Leader & Ambitious, contact at end)
examples.input:
Section: _top
Yumna Sweid
AP Capstone Diploma Honor Roll (9, 10, 11, 12 grade) Participation in All-State Honor Choir (10, 11, 12 grade) Participation in the University of Miami Frost School of Music Honor Choir (11 & 12 grade) Participation in the Florida Atlantic University School of Music Honor Choir (12 grade) Participation in the District Honor Choir (11 & 12 grade)

Section: education
BS in Finance, The University of Tampa - Tampa, Florida (Expected 2029) High School Diploma, Boca Raton Community High School - Boca Raton, Florida (2025) Cumulative GPA: 3.4 Weighted GPA: 4.3

Section: community service
Member, English Honor Society (2024-2025) Improved other students' English language proficiency. President, Chamber Choir (2024-2025) Led weekly rehearsals. Performed in seasonal school concerts and community events.

Section: servant leader, & ambitious
Costume Coordinator, International Thespian Society (2022-2025) (100+ hrs) Coordinated costumes of 4 musicals. Competed in Districts duet, small groups, and large groups. Soprano Section Leader, Chamber Choir (2023-2024) Coached fellow singers. President, Women's Treble Choir (2024-2025) Led weekly rehearsals. Received Superior in district competition. Full-Time Associate, Chick-Fil-A (2025-2026) Maintained superb attitude while serving customers. Took orders and processed payments. yumnaasweid@gmail.com (561) 618-2288
